lifecycle.postStart: /bin/bash -c if [ ! -d /data/shared/assets/.backup ]; then mkdir /data/shared/assets/.backup; fi; ln -s /data/shared/assets/.backup /data/local/dotsecure/backup; cp /data/shared/config/dotmarketing-config.properties /srv/dotserver/tomcat/webapps/ROOT/WEB-INF/classes/dotmarketing-config.properties;

/bin/bash -c if [ ! -d /data/shared/assets/.backup ]; then mkdir /data/shared/assets/.backup; fi; ln -s /data/shared/assets/.backup /data/local/dotsecure/backup; cp /data/shared/config/dotmarketing-config.properties /srv/dotserver/tomcat/webapps/ROOT/WEB-INF/classes/dotmarketing-config.properties;

/bin/bash -c if [ ! -d /data/shared/assets/.backup ]; then mkdir /data/shared/assets/.backup; fi; ln -s /data/shared/assets/.backup /data/local/dotsecure/backup; cp /data/shared/config/dotmarketing-config.properties /srv/dotserver/tomcat/webapps/ROOT/WEB-INF/classes/dotmarketing-config.properties;

anomalies.description: No PodDisruptionBudget manifest found. The dotCMS chart v1.0.34 supports pdb.auto mode.
anomalies.recommendation: Enable pdb: enabled: true in Helm values when replicas > 1

anomalies.description: Soft (preferred) pod anti-affinity in prod-1. Multiple pods may land on same node during spot reaping (TylerTech incident 2026-03-17).
anomalies.recommendation: Upgrade to requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution or enable chart PDB

anomalies.description: Uses deprecated 'kubernetes.io/ingress.class' annotation instead of spec.ingressClassName.
anomalies.recommendation: Migrate to spec.ingressClassName for Kubernetes 1.18+ compliance

anomalies.description: No PodDisruptionBudget manifest found. The dotCMS chart v1.0.34 supports pdb.auto mode.
anomalies.recommendation: Enable pdb: enabled: true in Helm values when replicas > 1
